description: You are a power systems engineer optimizing a legacy steady-state power flow solver in PyCharm at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/power_grid_sim. Refactor the computational modules in power_grid/admittance.py and power_grid/solver.py to use NumPy vectorization and matrix-vector operations instead of loops. The optimized solver must achieve a runtime of under 1.0 second on a 300-bus grid while maintaining numerical precision within a 1e-4 tolerance of the baseline. Verify the implementation using the provided test suite in tests/ and the performance using benchmark.py.
